header.subtitle: WHAT WE DO
header.title: Full-spectrum IT services for modern businesses.
header.description: From idea to deployment to scale — we cover every phase of your digital product lifecycle. We don't just write code — we architect systems designed to grow with your business.

solutions.title: Cloud Migration & DevOps
solutions.desc: Seamlessly move your infrastructure to AWS, Azure, or GCP. We handle architecture redesign, containerization with Docker/Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, and 24/7 monitoring — delivering 99.9% uptime.

solutions.title: AI & Intelligent Automation
solutions.desc: From GPT-powered chatbots to predictive analytics engines, we build AI solutions that automate workflows, extract insights from unstructured data, and supercharge decision-making.

solutions.title: Custom Software Development
solutions.desc: Full-cycle product engineering — from discovery and architecture to development, QA, and deployment. We build web platforms and internal tools that your team will love.

solutions.title: Mobile App Development
solutions.desc: Deliver exceptional mobile experiences. We build highly scalable, native and cross-platform applications for iOS and Android that drive engagement and business growth.

solutions.title: Data Engineering & Analytics
solutions.desc: Design and deploy scalable data pipelines, real-time dashboards, and business intelligence platforms. Turn raw data into actionable intelligence with modern lakehouse architectures.

solutions.title: Cybersecurity & Compliance
solutions.desc: Protect your digital assets with end-to-end security audits, penetration testing, zero-trust architecture, and compliance frameworks (SOC 2, GDPR, HIPAA).

solutions.title: Enterprise Platforms (CRM / ERP / HRMS)
solutions.desc: Custom-built business platforms that replace off-the-shelf bloat. Fully integrated CRM, ERP, and HRMS systems tailored to your workflows with real-time analytics.

ai_agents.title: Custom AI Agent Development
ai_agents.desc: Intelligent agents designed for specific workflows using LangChain, OpenAI, and LlamaIndex. From code generation to specialized research bots.

ai_agents.title: AI Voice Agents
ai_agents.desc: Conversational voice agents capable of handling inbound support, outbound sales, and scheduling with human-like natural language understanding.

ai_agents.title: AI Workflow Automation
ai_agents.desc: Complex, multi-step no-code/low-code automated workflows connecting your apps to AI. Save hours of manual work every week.

ai_agents.title: Lead Generation & Scraping Bots
ai_agents.desc: Automated agents that intelligently scrape the web, qualify leads, and populate your CRM without human intervention.

cta.title: Don't see what you need?
cta.description: We build custom solutions for unique challenges. Tell us about your project and our solutions architects will scope a plan within 48 hours.
